title: MineClient
description:
MineClient Performance and Function based modpack (client)
It adds new functions that make your gameplay faster and easier
body:
# MineClient Performance and Function based modpack (client)


## Performance

My modpack is providing the most powerful minecraft edition I ever used!
This pack includes some of the most-known mods for performance like DynamicFPS, Memory Leak Fix, ImmediatelyFast.


## Gameplay

The pack contains mods like Litematica (shematics) to help users build or JourneyMap for mapping the world.
This pack also contains Just Enough Items, so if you forget a recipe or a usage, it helps you out!
It also includes ReplayMod to record everything you do - even when you forgot the record button.
If you want to know all the mods ingame, we included Mod Menu so you can see and configurate all the mods.

## Features

Features (like mods, resource packs, shaders) may vary between different versions, so you should always check it. I am constantly trying to expand the modpack with options for your gameplay.
